page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepGMAP is a Deep learning-based Genotype MAPping platform to predict them. It can train different architectures of neural networks with epigenomic data, and "map" potential gene regulatory regions on a genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepGMAP is a Deep learning-based Genotype MAPping platform to predict them. It can train different architectures of neural networks with epigenomic data, and "map" potential gene regulatory regions on a genome.
